detectors.description:
Reentrancy in DAO.finalize(uint256) (contracts-min/DAO.sol#99-114):
	External calls:
	- hooks.onFinalized(id,passed) (contracts-min/DAO.sol#108)
	- tlId = timelock.queueTx(p.target,p.value,p.data) (contracts-min/DAO.sol#110)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- p.queued = true (contracts-min/DAO.sol#111)
	DAO.proposals (contracts-min/DAO.sol#55) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- DAO.finalize(uint256) (contracts-min/DAO.sol#99-114)
	- DAO.markExecuted(uint256) (contracts-min/DAO.sol#116-120)
	- DAO.proposals (contracts-min/DAO.sol#55)
	- DAO.propose(DAO.ProposalType,address,uint256,bytes,string) (contracts-min/DAO.sol#79-86)
	- DAO.vote(uint256,bool) (contracts-min/DAO.sol#88-97)

	[DAO.proposals](contracts-min/DAO.sol#L55) can be used in cross function reentrancies:

	- [DAO.vote(uint256,bool)](contracts-min/DAO.sol#L88-L97)

detectors.description:
DAO.finalize(uint256) (contracts-min/DAO.sol#99-114) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool,string)(block.timestamp >= p.end,early) (contracts-min/DAO.sol#102)
	- require(bool,string)(! p.executed && ! p.queued,done) (contracts-min/DAO.sol#103)
